top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ship Struck in Hormuz as Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again
top_signals.summary: A ship was hit by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, just hours after several freighters turned around while attempting to cross the vital waterway, developments that may undermine what had been a rapid reopening of the energy chokepoint.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan banks hesitate to buy JGBs as BOJ steps back
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China-linked viruses found on USB drives from online retailers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rout leads Strategy’s STRC to slide 26% below par as MSTR shares hits 16-month low
top_signals.summary: For the past year, Strategy has been issuing and tapping preferred securities like STRC to raise capital for additional bitcoin purchases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Teamsters claim victory over Amazon at NLRB, next step likely more challenging
top_signals.summary:
The Teamsters have won a battle with Amazon at the NLRB, but face a tougher challenge in any appeal.

The post Teamsters claim victory over Amazon at NLRB, next step likely more challenging appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Apple stock drops 6% on MacBook and iPad price hikes due to memory crunch
top_signals.summary: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: House backs $1.55 billion to revive E-7 Wedgetail, spares Navy Hawkeye
top_signals.summary: The White House budget office wants to raid a Navy radar-plane account and a classified Air Force line to pull the E-7 Wedgetail back from the dead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
